analogue_or_mono_v850_nec.why: This route is workshop verified with an IM508S, an analogue/mono V850-NEC dashboard and a working key. The dealer key was generated from the saved IMMO backup before returning to Add Key programming.
warnings: The standard Add Key routine did not generate the dealer key on the verified job.
Save and verify the IMMO backup before leaving the read routine.
Use the Xhorse B5 Green Super Remote for the verified aftermarket-key route.

virtual_cockpit_active_info_display.why: OBD IMMO acquisition is not supported on this dashboard type. Obtain IMMO data from a working key or use a supported bench/dashboard method.
warnings: No complete workshop-verified IM508S programming sequence has yet been recorded for this dashboard branch.

all_keys_lost.why: No complete workshop-verified MQB48 / MQB 4.5 all-keys-lost workflow has yet been recorded in the Knowledge Engine.

analogue_or_mono_v850_nec.why: OBD reading is supported on the verified analogue/mono dashboard route

virtual_cockpit_active_info_display.why: OBD IMMO reading is not supported on this dashboard type; obtain IMMO data from a working key or by a supported bench/dashboard method

decision_mqb5d_key_selection.question: Which compatible key is available?
decision_mqb5d_key_selection.why: MQB 5D requires a vehicle-correct OEM key or a dedicated supported aftermarket key
